name: slack-todos
description: Syncs Slack reactions you make into an Obsidian todos file

scripts.build:sidecar: tsc && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/sidecar.js --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output src-tauri/binaries/slack-todos-sidecar-aarch64-apple-darwin && mkdir -p src-tauri/resources && touch src-tauri/resources/.env
scripts.dev: npm run build:sidecar && cargo tauri dev
scripts.pack: npm run build:sidecar && cargo tauri build --bundles app
scripts.dist: npm run build:sidecar && cargo tauri build
